calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SYMETRA LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims (see word minutes for full details)

Defendant's motion to sever is granted. The court severs the cause of action for writ of mandamus against the Commissioner of the Department of Insurance ("CDI") and that claim will proceed under the existing case number. (CGC-23-604484). The court directs the Clerk of the Court to transfer the claims against the insurer for breach of contract and breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing to the Superior Court for Contra Costa County. The Contra Costa County court is expected to assign a new case number as to the insurer claims.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Curtis E. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
